rawAssistant: Here we are, safe and sound in Hollowfen after that stormy night. Your party is indeed healthy once more; I've given them a good soaking in healing energies to replenish their vitality. Now, what's the plan for tackling those lowland glows on the north road? Shall I help you decipher the old keepsake clue while you prepare your team for battle?
